overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban street. The player moves beneath a curved overpass with digital billboards, passes the illuminated MARQUESS building, and continues past a neon-lit pawn shop while encountering pedestrians on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street beneath curved overpass with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked pavement beneath a curved overpass structure lined with illuminated billboards

entered.detail: curved highway overpass structure with multiple illuminated digital advertisement screens on the underside
low concrete divider separating the sidewalk from the adjacent property
rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting the overhead lights
tall street lamps illuminating the road with warm white light
spiky palm plants in planters along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban street at night, with the camera walking forward beneath a massive curved overpass covered in digital billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting while a concrete barrier runs along the left side. The MARQUESS building becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with MARQUESS building visible

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath the highway overpass structure
ambient light drops significantly as camera moves deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: passing the illuminated MARQUESS building on the left and proceeding into the darker covered area beneath the overpass

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with large orange neon 'MARQUESS' signage on the facade
shadowed concrete underside of the highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The camera passes beneath the overpass into a darker, enclosed space. The MARQUESS building looms large on the left with its distinctive orange neon signage, while the environment becomes significantly darker and more sheltered from the rain. The concrete barrier continues along the left side as the path narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with illuminated pawn shop and commercial storefronts

events.description: exiting underpass into open street corner with neon-lit commercial storefronts
green neon glow from pawn shop sign reflects off the wet pavement surface

agents.ego_description: walking past the brightly lit pawn shop with green neon signage and continuing along the wet street corner

entered.detail: commercial storefront with bright green neon 'PAWN SHOP' signage and orange accents
black metal railings along the edge of the sidewalk near the storefront
large turquoise neon silhouette of a human figure on a distant building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a street corner dominated by a pawn shop with vivid green neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights. Metal railings line the right side near the storefront while the concrete barrier continues on the left. A distant turquoise neon figure sign becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with pedestrians ahead under overpass

events.description: slowing slightly while approaching two pedestrians walking in the same direction ahead
pedestrians temporarily block the forward view while being passed on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing two pedestrians walking ahead on the rain-soaked sidewalk, then continuing forward

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk, passed by the camera on the left side

entered.detail: two figures walking ahead on the sidewalk, seen from behind
bright lights from the overpass structure visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches two pedestrians walking ahead on the wet sidewalk beneath the overpass. After passing them on the left, the view opens up to show the continuation of the rain-soaked street with distant lights ahead. The concrete barrier remains on the left side as the journey continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban corridor that shifts from a wide overpass into a sheltered neon alleyway. It begins by walking forward beneath a massive curved overpass covered in digital billboards, where the wet asphalt reflects artificial light and the MARQUESS building appears in the distance. As the camera moves deeper into the underpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the orange neon signage of the MARQUESS building looming large on the left. The scene then opens back onto a street corner dominated by the vivid green neon of a pawn shop and a distant turquoise figure sign, while the camera passes two pedestrians on the wet sidewalk. Finally, the view expands to reveal the continuation of the rain-slicked street and distant city lights as the journey proceeds past the concrete barrier.
